match.userMessage:
Steady handheld drifts slowly forward. Scarlett turns her head gradually away from camera to face the open ocean, her smile softening to a small private expression as wind sweeps hair across her face. A wave breaks, sending foam around her bare feet.
Light breeze stirs the hem of her skirt and canvas tote.

ocean waves and gentle wind. wave breaking at feet, hair and fabric fluttering.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
